message:
test(hooks): fix test mock patterns causing failures in sharded CI (#9349)

- Replace globalThis.fetch assignment with vi.stubGlobal/vi.unstubAllGlobals
  in useBonusPoints, useGatewayStatus, useServiceImportsCard tests
- Fix unstable cluster mock references in useIntoto-hook and useGatewayStatus/
  useServiceImportsCard tests: use mockUseClusters.mockReturnValue(stable obj)
  instead of vi.fn(() => []) which created new array refs on every render,
  breaking useCallback dependency arrays and causing infinite re-renders
- Fix wrong alias names in useCachedGitOps (roleBindings → bindings),
  useCachedK8sResources (configMaps/replicaSets/etc → lowercase),
  useCachedCoreWorkloads (workloads key test matches hardcoded key)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
